2603.28613.title: TGIF2: Extended Text-Guided Inpainting Forgery Dataset & Benchmark
2603.28613.paper_summary: Generative AI has made text-guided inpainting a powerful image editing tool, but at the same time a growing challenge for media forensics. Existing benchmarks, including our text-guided inpainting forgery (TGIF) dataset, show that image forgery localization (IFL) methods can localize manipulations in spliced images but struggle not in fully regenerated (FR) images, while synthetic image detection (SID) methods can detect fully regenerated images but cannot perform localization. With new generative inpainting models emerging and the open problem of localization in FR images remaining, updated datasets and benchmarks are needed. We introduce TGIF2, an extended version of TGIF, that captures recent advances in text-guided inpainting and enables a deeper analysis of forensic robustness. TGIF2 augments the original dataset with edits generated by FLUX.1 models, as well as with random non-semantic masks. Using the TGIF2 dataset, we conduct a forensic evaluation spanning IFL and SID, including fine-tuning IFL methods on FR images and generative super-resolution attacks. Our experiments show that both IFL and SID methods degrade on FLUX.1 manipulations, highlighting limited generalization. Additionally, while fine-tuning improves localization on FR images, evaluation with random non-semantic masks reveals object bias. Furthermore, generative super-resolution significantly weakens forensic traces, demonstrating that common image enhancement operations can undermine current forensic pipelines. In summary, TGIF2 provides an updated dataset and benchmark, which enables new insights into the challenges posed by modern inpainting and AI-based image enhancements. TGIF2 is available at https://github.com/IDLabMedia/tgif-dataset.
2603.28613.paper_summary_zh: 生成式 AI 使得文本引導的修補成為一種強大的圖像編輯工具，但同時也對媒體鑑識帶來了日益嚴峻的挑戰。現有的基準，包括我們的文本引導修補偽造 (TGIF) 數據集，顯示圖像偽造定位 (IFL) 方法能夠在拼接圖像中定位操控，但在完全重生成 (FR) 圖像中卻面臨困難，而合成圖像檢測 (SID) 方法能夠檢測完全重生成的圖像，但無法進行定位。隨著新的生成修補模型的出現，以及在 FR 圖像中定位的開放性問題仍然存在，更新的數據集和基準是必要的。我們介紹 TGIF2，TGIF 的擴展版本，捕捉了文本引導修補的最新進展，並使得對鑑識穩健性的更深入分析成為可能。TGIF2 透過 FLUX.1 模型生成的編輯以及隨機非語義遮罩增強了原始數據集。使用 TGIF2 數據集，我們進行了一項涵蓋 IFL 和 SID 的鑑識評估，包括在 FR 圖像上微調 IFL 方法和生成超解析攻擊。我們的實驗顯示，無論是 IFL 還是 SID 方法在 FLUX.1 操控上都有降級，突顯了有限的泛化能力。此外，雖然微調改善了 FR 圖像的定位，但使用隨機非語義遮罩的評估揭示了物體偏見。此外，生成超解析顯著削弱了鑑識痕跡，顯示出常見的圖像增強操作可能會破壞當前的鑑識流程。總之，TGIF2 提供了一個更新的數據集和基準，使我們能夠對現代修補和基於 AI 的圖像增強所帶來的挑戰有新的見解。TGIF2 可在 https://github.com/IDLabMedia/tgif-dataset 獲得。
2603.28613.author: Hannes Mareen et.al.
2603.28613.authors: Hannes Mareen, Dimitrios Karageorgiou, Paschalis Giakoumoglou, Peter Lambert, Symeon Papadopoulos, Glenn Van Wallendael
